Federation via HTTP remotesapi established. Pull direction (phathub←DTO-A165) working. Key findings: (1) dolt 1.59.10 (phathub) vs 1.83.0 (DTO-A165) auth format mismatch blocks push from DTO-A165→phathub; (2) pull works in standalone mode only (dolt SQL server proxy path has routing issue via phathub's multi-default-route); (3) root@% needs CLONE_ADMIN on DTO-A165 for phathub to pull; (4) phathub shim injects --remotesapi-port 8000 when called directly. bd list verified on phathub shows current beads.
